artifactRefs.description: Focused and full-suite package behavior report for iTerm cell-size parity

contractCoverage.obligation: Present the 36x36 pet raster in the same 4x2 terminal-cell footprint as Ghostty.
Emit identical cell geometry in direct and tmux-wrapped iTerm headers.
Update geometry atomically on font resize and suppress output when the composer cannot fit.

surfaceEvidence.contractRef: G003 observable protocol and widget behavior
surfaceEvidence.invocation: bun test packages/tui/test/iterm2-protocol.test.ts packages/tui/test/gajae-pet.test.ts packages/coding-agent/test/gajae-pet-widget.test.ts; cd packages/tui && bun test

adversarialCases.scenario: Pixel dimensions are interpreted as device pixels on a Retina iTerm display.
adversarialCases.expectedBehavior: Display dimensions use terminal cells while raster dimensions remain 36x36 pixels.

adversarialCases.scenario: Multipart headers are wrapped one record at a time for tmux passthrough.
adversarialCases.expectedBehavior: The wrapped header retains width=4;height=2 and cursor ordering remains correct.

adversarialCases.scenario: Cell metrics change from 9x18 to 18x18 while the pet lease is active.
adversarialCases.expectedBehavior: The old lease is invalidated and reserve, cursor, rectangle, and header update to 2x2 in the same tick.

adversarialCases.scenario: The terminal becomes too narrow for the framed composer and pet reserve.
adversarialCases.expectedBehavior: Raster submission stops and the owned lease is invalidated without composer overlap.
